archetype: Archetype 5 (Luxury) mixed with Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) for Institutional Web3

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing, architectural grids, strict hierarchy.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento grids for product features (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4), wide gap-8 to gap-12.
layout_and_spacing.surfaces: Grid Borders - technical look. border-collapse style layout for data and features. Flat backgrounds, 1px subtle border, no heavy shadows. Glassmorphism for sticky nav.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Slight lift (-translate-y-1), border color brightens to rgba(255,255,255,0.3).
motion_and_interaction.animations: Subtle fade-in on scroll for main sections.

marketing_navbar.description: Distinct from the main app navbar. Glassmorphism effect: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 border-b border-white/10.

cta.style: bg-accent_primary text-white px-6 py-2 rounded-none hover:bg-accent_hover font-medium text-sm transition-colors

hero_section.layout: Centered or heavily asymmetrical. Large typography.
hero_section.background: Abstract data texture with heavy black overlay (bg-black/80) so text is highly legible.
hero_section.headline: Institutional-Grade Finance, Onchain.
hero_section.subheadline: Explore tokenized real-world assets and yield products built for the enterprise.

trust_strip.description: Logos of partners, auditors, and integrated chains. Grayscale, opacity-50, hover:opacity-100 transition.

product_suite.layout: Grid of cards. Each card represents a financial product (e.g., Tokenized Treasuries, Global Markets).
product_suite.card_style: bg-surface border border-white/10 p-8 flex flex-col gap-4 hover:border-white/30 transition-colors

metrics_section.layout: Large numbers, monospace font for data. Grid cols-3.

footer.description: Extensive footer with disclaimers, compliance text, and secondary links.
footer.disclaimer_style: text-xs text-gray-600 leading-relaxed mt-12 pt-8 border-t border-white/10

images.description: Corporate skyscraper looking up, black and white.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets APCA standards. Minimum 4.5:1 for body text.
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='marketing-nav-launch-app', data-testid='product-card-usdy')

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a separate marketing landing page at `/`.
This landing page MUST use the custom marketing_navbar defined above, NOT the main app navbar.
The 'Launch App' button in the marketing navbar MUST route to `/discover`.
Implement the landing page with an enterprise Web3 positioning: dark theme, high contrast, clean sans-serif fonts (Outfit, IBM Plex Sans), and rigorous grid layouts.
Include specific sections: Hero, Trust/Ecosystem strip, Product Suite, Metrics (TVL, Assets), Insights, and a robust Footer with compliance disclaimers.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing layout structures to allow asymmetrical, non-standard layouts. Use Shadcn strictly for interactive components if needed.
The rest of the app (like /discover, /dashboard) should keep the existing app shell and wallet connect.
